summary: Phase 2 COMPLETE (7/7 changes qa_passed). P0 gate: JWT verify, RLS SET LOCAL, fdb-reflection crate, RestCompiler route registration, ArcSwap hot-swap all delivered. P1 additions: pgvector RPC dispatch (handle_rpc fully live) and OpenAPI 3.1.0 compiler (pre-existing, now verified). G4 partial: CRUD handler bodies (handle_list/insert/update/delete) still todo!(); G7 partial: 3 integration gate tests #[ignore] pending PG18 container. Two security gates outstanding: column-name SQL injection validation and DEK serde gate test. Recommended next phase: p3-auth-rls-keto.
